headline: Assessing Devon Energy (DVN) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Cash Flow Moves
summary: Why Devon Energy is on investors’ radar Devon Energy (DVN) has been drawing fresh interest after a period of solid share price gains, with the stock showing positive returns over the past week, month, past 3 months, and year to date. See our latest analysis for Devon Energy. That recent momentum has been building for a while, with a 90 day share price return of 27.87% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 37.33% at a latest share price of US$46.25. headline: Barclays Lifts PT on Devon Energy Corporation (DVN) to $54 From $52 – Here’s Why
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is one of the most undervalued energy stocks to buy now. On March 13, Barclays lifted the price target on Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) to $54 from $52 while reiterating an Overweight rating on the shares.
